subject: IBAS GRB alerts 1679, 1680, 1681
body:
D. Gotz on behalf of the IBAS Localization Team reports:

IBAS Alerts n. 1679, 1680, 1681 are not caused by a GRB or an SGR. They
are due to a known source, but the attitude information was incorrect at
the time of the triggers, so they were not filtered out.
